codeReview.summary: Extraction of JavaScript DOM and Events is complete and accurate. All required concepts are covered with code examples, reference tables, and flash cards.

VAL-CHEAT-008.evidence: Covers getElementById, querySelector, querySelectorAll, DOM traversal (parentElement, children, siblings), DOM manipulation (textContent, innerHTML, classList), styles manipulation

VAL-CHEAT-009.evidence: Covers addEventListener, event object (target, currentTarget, type, key, clientX/clientY), bubbling, capturing, preventDefault, stopPropagation

summary: Review passed. The extraction for JavaScript DOM (Module 9) and JavaScript Events (Module 10) is complete and accurate. All expected topics per the feature description are covered: DOM selection (getElementById, querySelector, querySelectorAll), DOM traversal, DOM manipulation, addEventListener, event object, bubbling, capturing, preventDefault, stopPropagation. Content is well-organized with code examples, reference tables, and flash cards for review. The extraction fulfills both VAL-CHEAT-008 and VAL-CHEAT-009 assertions.
